title: brachyglottis myrianthos
intro: Brachyglottis myrianthos, also known as the Pittosporum, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and combat bacterial infections. The medicinal properties of Brachyglottis myrianthos have been used to promote overall health and wellness, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
